positive: Minimalist nature scene art, featuring a silhouette of a majestic mountain range under a vast, stylized crescent moon and scattering stars. Below the mountains, include clean silhouettes of diverse wildlife: a leaping deer, a fox, and a large owl in flight. The sky should gradient from deep indigo to cosmic teal. The overall aesthetic must be high-contrast, elegant linework, and easily legible when printed on fabric. Inspired by deep space astronomy and modern bohemian forest motifs. Central composition, rule of thirds for the sky/ground divide. Graphic style, vector art influence, highly detailed, ethereal lighting, clean edges, suitable for apparel screen printing.
negative: blurry, messy, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, multiple images, out of frame, jpeg artifacts, grain, cluttered, cartoonish, photorealistic
